name: obsidian-r2-upload
description: Obsidian plugin: upload images to Cloudflare R2 (mobile friendly).
author: abigmiu

scripts.install-plugin: npm run build && mkdir -p ~/Documents/Obsidian/Obsidian\ Dev/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-r2-upload && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css ~/Documents/Obsidian/Obsidian\ Dev/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-r2-upload/
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
